query: ok im back, opening claude in my cognitiveos project after like 5 days off, what was i even doing here
where did i leave off on this
catch me up
honestly im lost. i had a thing i was in the middle of and i cant remember what
quick, dont lose my place but i just thought of something: we should add rate limiting to the webhook later. note that down somewhere

alright im done for tonight, save where we are so future me isnt confused tomorrow
whats next
im starting a fresh session on the starc repo, get me oriented before we touch anything
i keep jumping between three things and losing track, can you just tell me the one thing to do right now
whats on my google calendar for today, do i have any meetings before noon

summarize this 30 page PDF spec i just dropped in downloads and pull out the API rate limits
write me a python function that dedupes a list of dicts by the id field

remind me to call the bank tomorrow at 10am about the wire transfer
my laptop is running super slow and the fan is going crazy, whats eating the cpu
